segments.text: Since, then, you have been raised with Christ,
set your hearts on things above, where Christ is, seated at the right hand of God.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Set your minds on things above, not on earthly things.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For you died, and your life is now hidden with Christ in God.
When Christ, who is your life, appears, then you also will appear with him in glory.
Put to death, therefore, whatever belongs to your earthly nature: sexual immorality, impurity, lust, evil desires and greed, which is idolatry.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Because of these, the wrath of God is coming.
You used to walk in these ways, in the life you once lived.
But now you must also rid yourselves of all such things as these: anger, rage, malice, slander, and filthy language from your lips.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Do not lie to each other, since you have taken off your old self with its practices
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: and have put on the new self, which is being renewed in knowledge in the image of its Creator.
Here there is no Gentile or Jew, circumcised or uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave or free, but Christ is all, and is in all.
Therefore, as God's chosen people, holy and dearly loved, clothe yourselves with compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness and patience.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Bear with each other and forgive one another if any of you has a grievance against someone. Forgive as the Lord forgave you.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And over all these virtues put on love, which binds them all together in perfect unity.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, since as members of one body you were called to peace. And be thankful.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let the message of Christ dwell among you richly as you teach and admonish one another with all wisdom through psalms, hymns, and songs from the Spirit, singing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And whatever you do, whether in word or deed, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father through him.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Wives, submit yourselves to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Husbands, love your wives and do not be harsh with them.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Children, obey your parents in everything, for this pleases the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Fathers, do not embitter your children, or they will become discouraged.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Slaves, obey your earthly masters in everything; and do it, not only when their eye is on you and to curry their favor, but with sincerity of heart and reverence for the Lord.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for human masters,
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: since you know that you will receive an inheritance from the Lord as a reward. It is the Lord Christ you are serving.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Anyone who does wrong will be repaid for their wrongs, and there is no favoritism.
